눈시울이 붉어져

너도 나와 같을지
아직 그리울지
밝게 빛나던 널 기억해
난 말야

어두운 세상 끝에
더는 웃지 못할 때
나를 비춰준 건
너였다고

네가 없었던 긴 시간 속에서
그저 널 기다리는 나
넌 알까
언제나 내 별이었던 너
이젠 내가
너의 빛이 돼줄게
항상

너는 알고 있을까
힘겨웠던 지난날
나를 일으켜 걷게 해준
너의 노랫말이

어떤 일이 있어도
잘 해낼 거라 믿어
언제나 밝은 너라면
뭐든 이겨낼 거야

한 번쯤 삶에 지쳐
내가 필요할 때
언제든 내게 편히 기대
괜찮아

항상 기다릴게
너의 뒤편에서
언제나 이곳에
내가 있어

네가 없었던 긴 시간 속에서
그저 널 기다리는 나
넌 알까
언제나 내 별이었던 너
이젠 내가
너의 빛이 돼줄게

괜찮아 너도 참 힘들었겠지
굳이 말하지 않아도
다 알아
밝게 빛날 너의 앞길에
수많은 별 중
한줄기 빛이 될게 Ah

네가 없었던 긴 시간 속에서
그저 널 기다리는 나
넌 알까
언제나 내 별이었던 너
이젠 내가
너의 빛이 돼줄게

isi.albums: All We Have Is Not What We Need
isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYANG - 1:9

Romanization

I need you, I want you
all of the time
I’ll break my weakness and get back on my feet
I pray for the souls floating in the wind
Until they find home
I pray for us and let this be my only wish for a moment

“Be strong and bold. Don’t be afraid. Do everything in love.
And I’m always with you.
You are the light of the world.”

What should I do? I don’t know if I’m qualified
When fears come to me, please reach out to me
I’m just nothing without your love
And now please come to me
Please reach out to me
I am nothing
A storm is approaching me
Can I dive into your love
When I want to give up?

Even if I am a poor and useless man in this world
Even if the world doesn’t need me anymore,
They can’t break my love

“Be strong and bold. Don’t be afraid. Do everything in love.
And I’m always with you.

isi.albums: All We Have Is Not What We Need
isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYANG - Presence

Romanization

I saw you standing in the crowd
Your eyes met mine, and time slowed down
A feeling that I can’t explain
Like we’re caught in the same refrain

I never thought I’d feel this way
But you’re the one who makes me stay
In every word, in every glance
I feel you coming to me like fate

I seek her, for all time
I just want you to be mine
I don’t know who you are
All I need is your presence, it’s meant to be

In a rocking chair, we found our peace
We looked up at the faint night sky
The stars whispered stories untold
As if our hearts were being consoled

I never knew that love could heal
But in your arms, it all feels real
In every touch, in every hush
I find a world where we can lie

I seek her, for all time
I just want you to be mine
I don’t know who you are
All I need is your presence, it’s meant to be

I just want you to be mine
I don’t know who you are

isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYANG - I got a feeling

Romanization

I see the future with you
Oh, that’s my hope

Do you ever mind when I’m close to you?
But still, I like you

We’re not close yet, but it’s just
It’s just only my wish

If you say “hello” to me every time
Oh, I got a feeling, feeling now

I got a feeling
I got a feeling, feeling now
I got a feeling
I got a feeling, feeling now

I don’t know what you’re thinking right now, so I’m curious ‘bout it
Your incomprehensible expression makes—
It makes me lose my mind

But I really think I know now

isi.albums: All We Have Is Not What We Need
isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYANG - In All This Time

Romanization

The hands of time keep slipping by,
Yet we walk as if we own the sky.

Every breath, a fleeting trace,
Drifting silently into space.
The end is where we start.

Time moves on, unnoticed still
We live as if we have it all,

(In all this time)

Love’s the truth we can’t deny.
It’s the one thing that stays inside.
A light that fills you with love.

We pray for you.

A hundred years will come and go,
Still, we dream of the unknown,

(In all this time)

Through the days, we chase so much,
Only love will carry on through us.
The end is where we start.

Time moves on, unnoticed still,
We live as if we have it all,

(In all this time)

Love’s the truth we can’t deny.
It’s the one thing that stays inside.
A light that fills you with love.

We pray for you.

Hangeul

We pray for you.

We live as if we have it all,

(In all this time)

We pray for you.

isi.albums: All We Have Is Not What We Need
isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYANG - HEY!

Romanization

I take a breath and face the day
The road ahead will lead me to my way

Is this my fate or an open gate?
Or something more I can't explain?

The world keeps turning night and day
But I can choose to change my way somehow

Every step I take today
Will keep me close and lead me toward the light

Hey, feel the love inside you
That heart will guide with affirmation

Breathe in the light inside you
Speak with love and heal your pain

Some days don’t go the way I planned
I stand and wonder where I am, lost in time

The road ahead is filled with twists and turns
But every piece will fall in place in time

Every moment drifts away
Someday it all will be aligned
Every step I take today
Will guide me through and light my way, always

Hey, feel the love inside you
That heart will guide with affirmation
Breathe in the light inside you
Speak with love and heal your pain

I see the world in a different light
I know my path is mine to take today
I won’t be bound by the fear inside
I’ll write my story my own way, always

Hangeul

I take a breath and face the day
The road ahead will lead me to my way

Is this my fate or an open gate?

The world keeps turning night and day

The road ahead is filled with twists and turns

Every step I take today

Hey, feel the love inside you

Speak with love and heal your pain

I see the world in a different light

I won’t be bound by the fear inside
I’ll write my story my own way, always
